name: Sophos Intercept X
description: Integrates with Sophos Central APIs for endpoint protection, alert management, endpoint isolation, and tamper protection configuration

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve alerts from Sophos Central with filtering options

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return per page

parameters.name: pageFromKey
parameters.description: Key for next page pagination

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date-time for alert query (ISO 8601)

actions.name: Get Alert
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific alert by its ID

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert

actions.name: Update Alert
actions.description: Take action on an alert such as acknowledging or resolving it

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action to take: acknowledge, cleanPua, authPua, clean

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Optional message for the action

actions.name: List Endpoints
actions.description: Retrieve a list of managed endpoints (computers and servers)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of endpoints to return per page

parameters.name: pageFromKey
parameters.description: Key for next page pagination

parameters.name: healthStatus
parameters.description: Filter by health status: good, suspicious, bad, unknown

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by endpoint type: computer, server

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for hostname, IP address, or associated person

actions.name: Get Endpoint Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific endpoint

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the endpoint

actions.name: Isolate Endpoint
actions.description: Isolate one or more endpoints from the network

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Set to true to isolate, false to remove isolation

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: JSON array of endpoint IDs to isolate

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment describing the reason for isolation

actions.name: Scan Endpoint
actions.description: Trigger an on-demand scan on a specific endpoint

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the endpoint to scan

actions.name: Get Tamper Protection Status
actions.description: Retrieve the tamper protection status and password for an endpoint

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the endpoint

actions.name: List Allowed Items
actions.description: Retrieve the list of allowed items (exclusions) in the environment

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return per page

parameters.name: pageFromKey
parameters.description: Key for next page pagination

actions.name: Add Allowed Item
actions.description: Add a new item to the allowed list (exclusion) for a specific property type

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of property to allow: sha256, path, certificateSigner, detectionId

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value of the item to allow

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment explaining why the item is allowed
